title: Settings
description: Manage your display and appearance preferences.

general.title: General settings
general.colorModeHint: Choose the display mode for the interface.
general.themeColorHint: Choose the accent color for the interface.
general.languageHint: Choose the display language for the website.
general.skipIntroHint: Skip the landing page intro sequence.

security.title: Account Security
security.description: Manage your password, two-factor authentication, and login sessions.

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure.
changePassword.successDetail: Your password has been updated. Other login sessions have been signed out.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
twoFactor.setupStep1: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.)
twoFactor.setupStep2: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to confirm
twoFactor.manualEntryHint: If you can't scan the QR code, enter this code in your authenticator app.
twoFactor.verificationCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
twoFactor.setupSuccessDetail: Your account is now protected with two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.disableWarning: Disabling 2FA will reduce your account security. Enter your password to confirm.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesHint: Save these codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once when you don't have your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesSaved: I have saved my recovery codes

sessions.title: Login Sessions
sessions.description: Manage devices currently signed into your account.
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out all other devices?
sessions.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out this session?

alerts.title: Security Alerts
alerts.description: Get notified when there's suspicious activity on your account.
alerts.emailOnNewLoginHint: Receive an email when someone signs in from a new device or location.
alerts.emailOnPasswordChangeHint: Receive a confirmation email when your password is changed.

account.title: Account
account.description: View your personal information and manage your account.

profile.title: Personal Information
profile.description: Your account information. Some data is synced from Discord.
profile.updateSuccessDetail: Avatar and display name have been synced.

avatar.title: Avatar
avatar.description: Your current avatar is synced from Discord.

email.title: Email
email.description: The email used for your zSystems account.

linkedAccounts.title: Linked Accounts
linkedAccounts.description: Discord and Steam accounts linked to your zSystems account.

deactivate.title: Deactivate Account
deactivate.description: Temporarily suspend your account. You can reactivate by contacting support.
deactivate.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to deactivate your account? You will be signed out and unable to sign in until reactivated.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all data after 12 hours. This action cannot be undone.
delete.confirmMessage: This action cannot be undone. Your account will be permanently deleted after 12 hours. All data will be lost.
delete.success: Account will be deleted in 12 hours
delete.successDetail: You can cancel by contacting support before the deadline.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Manage how you receive notifications from zSystems.

security.title: Security Notifications
security.loginAlertHint: Email when there's a login from a new device.
security.passwordChangeHint: Email when your password is changed.

activity.title: Account Activity
activity.accountChangesHint: Email when account information is updated.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Receive emails about news and promotions.
marketing.promotionalHint: Receive news, events, and offers from 7-Mau Community.

profile.title: Update Profile
profile.description: Sync your avatar and display name from Discord and Steam.
profile.successDetail: Your avatar and display name have been synced.
profile.hint: Click the button below to fetch the latest avatar and display name from Discord and Steam.
